message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

package "Controller" {
  [C MainController]
}

package "DataBase" {
  [C DAO]
  [C DAOUser]
  [C DAODisease]
}

package "Model" {
  [C User]
  [C MedList]
  [C Calendar]
  [C UserAppearanceInfo]
  [C Disease]
  [C Med]
  [C Day]
  [C Food]
  [C Reminder]
  [C Task]
}

"C MainController" ..> "C DAO" : gets and updates information
"C MainController" ..> "C User" : manipulates and updates

"C DAO" <|-- "C DAOUser"
"C DAO" <|-- "C DAODisease"

"C User" -- "C MedList" : has
"C User" -- "C Calendar" : has
"C User" -- "C UserAppearanceInfo" : describes
"C User" -- "C Disease" : has

"C MedList" *-- "C Med" : contains
"C Calendar" *-- "C Day" : contains

"C Day" -- "C Food" : contains
"C Day" -- "C Reminder" : contains
"C Day" -- "C Task" : contains

@enduml
